svg.aria-label: one-more-highlight — Multi-state substring highlighting for React
svg.title: one-more-highlight
svg.desc: Wordmark for the one-more-highlight library: the words "one", "more", and "highlight" rendered with yellow, green, and pink highlight backgrounds respectively.
